chunks.text: 1 ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH CIRCUIT COURT MIRPURKHAS Civil Revision Application No.S-323 of 2024 “Aijaz Ali vs. Learned A.D.J Mirpurkhas and others” DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For order on M.A.No.580/2025. 2. For hearing of M.A.No.1939/ 201 7. 3. For hearing of main case. 12-02-2025. Mr. Dhiru Mal DM advocate for the applicant a/w applicant. Mr. Muhammad Sharif Solangi, Assistant A.G. = It is the case of applicant that his grand-father Punhoon s/o Mian Bux Pitafi filed Case No.SROR-165/2008 against illegal allotment of land in favour of Predecessors of respondent No.2 was allowed vide order dated 11-11-2011. Being aggrieved against said order the respondent No.1 filed F.C.Suit No. 76/ 2012 without joining the applicant as party and learned 3rd Senior Civil Judge, Mirpurkhas without first deciding question of jurisdiction whether suit is maintainable against order passed by Member Board of Revenue within the Revenue hierarchy, has passed judgment and decree which was upheld through impugned judgment dated 11-09-2014 passed in Civil Appeal No.10/2014 by learned 1st Additional District Judge, Mirpurkhas. After hearing at length, learned counsel for the applicant does not press instant Revision application with prayer to issue directions to the learned Additional District Jude-I, Mirpurkhas to entertain his application under section 12 C.P.C in Civil Appeal No. 10 of 2014 alongwith condonation of time consumed before this Court. Let applicant file application under section 12 CPC within 10 days hereof before the learned appellate court and learned appellate court shall decide the same in accordance with law after hearing parties.

After hearing at length, learned counsel for the applicant does not press instant Revision application with prayer to issue directions to the learned Additional District Jude-I, Mirpurkhas to entertain his application under section 12 C.P.C in Civil Appeal No. 10 of 2014 alongwith condonation of time consumed before this Court. Let applicant file application under section 12 CPC within 10 days hereof before the learned appellate court and learned appellate court shall decide the same in accordance with law after hearing parties. In view of above instant Revision application stands disposed of. JUDGE *Saleem*
